summary.intent: Implement Matrix OIDC authentication (Issue #711) to support modern homeservers like matrix.org that use Matrix Authentication Service (MAS) with OAuth 2.0/OIDC via MSC3861, since existing password/access_token auth modes are insufficient.
summary.outcome: Full OIDC two-phase browser flow implemented across Rust backend and JS frontend, PR #730 created and merged to main, with 9 Greptile review comments resolved across 4 iterations; critical runtime bug fixed (trait method dispatch) and redirect URI normalization added after manual QA revealed failures.

repo: ChannelPlugin trait methods must be overridden in `impl ChannelPlugin for MatrixPlugin`, not as inherent methods on `impl MatrixPlugin` — the gateway dispatches through `dyn ChannelPlugin` so inherent methods are invisible
RPC response data is under `res.payload`, not `res.result` — all JS callers must use `res.payload?.auth_url` etc.
matrix-sdk re-exports `matrix_sdk_base::store` as `matrix_sdk::store`, so `matrix_sdk::store::RoomLoadSettings` works without adding matrix-sdk-base as a direct dep
The `url` crate is already a workspace dependency available to all crates
Tailwind emerald/blue pastel backgrounds (bg-emerald-500/10) with light text (text-emerald-100) produce illegible contrast — must use dark text (text-emerald-900) on light backgrounds (bg-emerald-50)
MAS (Matrix Authentication Service) rejects HTTPS redirect URIs for loopback addresses per RFC 8252 — must normalize localhost/127.0.0.1 redirects to http:// scheme
MAS also validates client_uri and rejects bare origins without trailing slash
E2E tests follow the channels-nostr.spec.js pattern with mock RPC via `page.route`

code.finding: New file: OIDC flow with start_oidc_login, finish_oidc_login, restore_oidc_session, session persistence (tokio::fs, not std::fs), token refresh background task via subscribe_to_session_changes, and normalize_redirect_uri for RFC 8252 loopback compliance
oidc_start and oidc_complete must be in `impl ChannelPlugin for MatrixPlugin`, not in `impl MatrixPlugin` — gateway uses dyn ChannelPlugin dispatch
ChannelPlugin trait extended with default noop oidc_start/oidc_complete methods returning 'OIDC login not supported' error — allows generic dispatch from gateway without downcasting

oauth_start/oauth_complete iterate registry plugins, read-lock each as dyn ChannelPlugin, call trait methods; URL injection fixed by using url::Url builder with query_pairs_mut().append_pair() instead of string formatting
OIDC polling interval stored in useRef (oidcPollRef) and cleared in resetForm() and modal onClose to prevent leak; OIDC is set as default auth mode

workflow: Greptile automated review caught: token exposure via Debug derive, blocking std::fs in async, URL injection, polling interval leak, panic! in production code — all high-signal findings worth addressing immediately
Manual QA after PR merge is essential — the trait dispatch bug and MAS redirect URI rejection were only discovered by running the actual flow
When adding trait methods for plugin dispatch, immediately verify the implementation is on the trait impl block, not the inherent impl block
Use `secrecy::Secret<String>` for OAuth tokens and implement manual Debug with [REDACTED] instead of deriving Debug
Dead config fields (oidc_issuer was documented but matrix-sdk 0.16 has no API to override issuer) should be removed rather than left as forward-looking stubs

friction: matrix-sdk 0.16 OAuth API types (RoomLoadSettings, Raw, Localized, ClientRegistrationData) required multiple rounds of compiler errors to discover correct import paths and constructor signatures
The oidc_start/oidc_complete trait dispatch bug was silent at compile time — only appeared at runtime as 'OIDC login not supported' error after full integration
MAS redirect URI rejection (invalid_redirect_uri) required understanding RFC 8252 loopback redirect semantics not documented in matrix-sdk
Two rate limit hits during the session ('You've hit your limit') interrupted implementation flow
Greptile re-flagged already-fixed issues on subsequent review iterations due to comment association with new commit hashes, creating noise in 4-iteration resolution loop
The encryption guidance banner incorrectly implied OIDC doesn't support encrypted chats — needed correction after implementation was complete
open_items: oidc_issuer config field removed because matrix-sdk 0.16 has no API to override the issuer URL — should be re-added when matrix-sdk exposes that capability
E2E tests mock the RPC layer but don't do live OIDC flow against a real MAS instance — full integration test against matrix.org or a local MAS would be needed for true confidence
EditMatrixModal re-authenticate flow (triggering new OIDC flow for existing channels) implemented in UI but not exercised in E2E tests
Onboarding OIDC flow (onboarding-view.js) has same polling/auth flow as AddMatrixModal but no dedicated E2E spec coverage
Cross-signing bootstrap for OIDC uses bootstrap_cross_signing_if_needed(None) — the CrossSigningResetAuthType::OAuth path in client.rs:428 should be verified works end-to-end with MAS
